New Project Support to KHAS from TÜBİTAK 1505 University-Industry Collaboration Program

We’re pleased to announce that the project proposal, “

Artificial Intelligence Based Decision Support System for Financial Scoring and Crediting of Company Credit Applications

,” submitted by

Asst. Prof. Arif Selçuk Öğrenci

(KHAS Electrical-Electronics Engineering) and developed together with

Koç Finans

, has been funded by TÜBİTAK 1505 University-Industry Collaboration Support Program.

Prof. Dr. Ayşe Hümeyra Bilge and Asst. Prof. Aslı Togan Eğrican also take part as researchers in the project.

We congratulate our professors and wish them success in their research.
